title: Fix the Linting Failure
description: A contributor placed an import below a function definition, violating E402.
pr_diff:
PR Diff:
  + def calculate_retry_delay(attempt: int, base: float = 2.0) -> float:
  +     """Exponential backoff with jitter."""
  +     return base ** attempt
  +
  + import time   # wrong position, import not at top of file
initial_ci_output:
ruff check src/utils.py
src/utils.py:47:1: E402 Module level import not at top of file
FAILED

files.src/utils.py:
def calculate_retry_delay(attempt: int, base: float = 2.0) -> float:
    """Exponential backoff with jitter."""
    return base ** attempt

import time


def wait_with_backoff(attempt: int) -> None:
    delay = calculate_retry_delay(attempt)
    time.sleep(delay)

ruff check src/utils.py
src/utils.py:47:1: E402 Module level import not at top of file
FAILED
